SUBASH REDDY BALUPUNURI

PROJECTS
P2P – Peer-to-Peer Video Conferencing System(Deployed)
Engineered a full-stack WebRTC-based conferencing system supporting multi-user calls, real-time
chat, screen sharing, and session recording using direct browser-to-browser streaming. Designed
custom signaling with Socket.io and implemented JWT authentication with MongoDB for secure room
access and session management.
Technologies: WebRTC, Socket.io, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JWT, MediaRecorder API, HTML, CSS,
JavaScript
Airbnb Clone (Full-Stack Web Application)(Deployed)
Built a functional Airbnb-like web application with dynamic property listings and detailed views.
Developed a responsive frontend using React.js and implemented backend REST APIs with Node.js and
Express.js. Used MongoDB for data storage and retrieval.
Technologies: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JavaScript
Birsa Netra – Digitalization of Forest Rights Act (SIH Project) (Deployed)
Worked as a frontend contributor to display structured FRA data through intuitive user interfaces with AI-
Bot Assistance. Supported land and forest mapping by integrating real-time satellite imagery
visualization using QGIS. Focused on clarity, usability, and data presentation with
